name: claude-local-bridge
description: Exposes Claude Code credentials as a local OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible HTTP API on localhost:11437

claudeLocalBridge.port.description: Port for the local HTTP API server

claudeLocalBridge.httpsEnabled.description: Also serve the bridge over HTTPS for Claude Cowork / third-party gateway testing

claudeLocalBridge.httpsPort.description: Port for the optional local HTTPS server

claudeLocalBridge.httpsKeyFile.description: Absolute path to the TLS private key file used by the optional HTTPS server

claudeLocalBridge.httpsCertFile.description: Absolute path to the TLS certificate file used by the optional HTTPS server

claudeLocalBridge.anthropicBaseUrl.description: Anthropic API base URL (override for staging or custom gateway)

claudeLocalBridge.apiKey.description: Manual Anthropic API key fallback (lowest priority — used only if no other credential source is found)

claudeLocalBridge.defaultModel.description: Default model to use when none is specified in the request

claudeLocalBridge.modelCatalog.description: Which model catalog to advertise from GET /v1/models

claudeLocalBridge.opencodeGoApiKey.description: OpenCode Go API key for provider-backed models exposed through this bridge

claudeLocalBridge.opencodeGoBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the OpenCode Go upstream API

claudeLocalBridge.opencodeGoAuthScheme.description: How the OpenCode Go API key should be sent upstream

claudeLocalBridge.logRequests.description: Enable verbose request/response logging to the Output channel

commands.title: Claude Local Bridge: Show Credential Source
